word: H2836 - חָשַׁק - châshaq - khaw-shak' - Have a delight

sections.paragraph:
Original: חשׁק

Transliteration: châshaq

Phonetic: khaw-shak'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to love, be attached to, long for
  2. (Piel) fillet
  3. (Pual) fillet

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 773

Part(s) of speech: Verb
